creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm confused.

- edit-pr is no longer used, along with the rest of gnats.
- edit-pr *was* for use by people with logins to freefall

Can you please clarify:

- What action(s) you should be able to take, but can't
- As what user or group(s) in Bugzilla
- And provide example bugs that reproduce the issue

Thanks Mikhail
